msg: Found 3 auth issues in login.ts. Rate limiting missing on /api/auth endpoint. CSRF token not validated. Session token stored in localStorage instead of httpOnly cookie.
TypeScript errors in middleware.ts and session.ts. Fixing type annotations now.
All fixes applied. TypeScript clean, 12/12 tests passing. Auth middleware now enforces CSRF validation, rate limiting added on login endpoint, session tokens moved to httpOnly cookie.
